hero.subtitle: Ryokan Wellness Retreat
hero.description: Experience the soul of a traditional Japanese Ryokan — where hot mineral onsen, classic shiatsu and the philosophy of 'Ma' (sacred silence) harmonise to restore mind and body.

seasons.label: Seasonal treatments
seasons.title: Four seasons
seasons.description: The Japanese philosophy of 'Shizen' — living in harmony with nature. Each treatment reflects the unique beauty of each season.

onsen.label: Onsen & Shiatsu
onsen.title: The authentic
onsen.description: Hot mineral baths in the style of a traditional Ryokan — designed to honour 'Ma' (sacred silence) and 'Wabi-sabi' (the beauty of imperfection).

booking.label: Omakase Booking
booking.title: Leave it all
booking.description: 'Omakase' — entrust everything to us. Just tell us the time and number of guests, the rest is a wonderful surprise.
booking.name: Name
